title: delve and golang security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update Delve to 1.25.2

[1.24.1-3]
- Update CI support

golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3

[1.25.1-1]
- Update to Go1.25.1 -Resolves: RHEL-116849

[1.25.0-5]
- Disable race for risv64

[1.25.0-4]
- Revert DWARF5 defaults

[1.25.0-3]
- Update CI support

[1.25.0-2]
- rpminspect.yaml: Add preprofile binary as it contains debugging symbols

[1.25.0-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.0

delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

- Update CI support

golang
[1.25.3-1]
